allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.match\(/^[A-Z]/\)\).sort\(\); console.log\(names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('facebook'\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('instagram'\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linkedin'\)\).join\('\\n'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.match\(/^[A-Z]/\)\); console.log\(names.filter\(n => n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('globe'\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('external'\) || n.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('share'\)\).slice\(0,10\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
